content.en:
Black Valley.

The five fifth-fold ancestor-level primordial black beasts were cultivating, and they didn't feel the danger coming at all.

Suddenly.

A terrifying aura descended, directly tearing through the barrier between the primordial Black Sea and the Black Valley, and stepped into here.

At this time, these five Fivefold Ancestors immediately sensed it.

"Cultivator!"

"Five-fold Ancestor Early Stage!"

"It's not a big threat, kill him!"

Although the Black Valley is not a river basin, as long as Ye Tian is killed and all the resources and treasure houses in this treasure land are transferred in time, the losses can be reduced.

Otherwise, a group of Fivefold Origin Ancestor cultivators would invade here, and they wouldn't be able to stop it.

However, they underestimated Ye Tian.

"Endless Golden Light!"

Ye Tian made a direct move, smashing the big array here with one blow, and directly killing the five fivefold ancestors in the big array.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Of these five five-fold ancestors, the lowest is the early stage of the five-fold ancestor, and the highest is only in the middle stage of the five-fold ancestor, and the combat effectiveness is weak, that is, the ordinary five-fold ancestor, naturally he can't even withstand a blow.

After killing these five fivefold primordial ancestors in an instant, Ye Tian waved his hand again, killed some primordial black beasts, and immediately took away the treasure house resources here, and after collecting almost the same, he fled from here directly.

In the next moment, several Primordial Black Beasts of the peak level of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor came here.

One by one, they were furious, but they were helpless, and immediately took away the original black beast that was still alive.

As for this treasure land, the Black Valley, he directly chose to give up.

And Ye Tian didn't bother to occupy this treasure land, after all, the Yuan Shen Palace knew the location of this treasure land, if he occupied it and sent the disciples of the Void Tooth Holy Gate to garrison it, he would definitely be retaliated against by the powerhouses of the Yuan Shen Palace.

"Although I don't want the Black Valley, I can sell it to the other Fivefold Holy Gates!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he talked to the Void Fang Holy Ancestor, and directly took out the Black Valley for auction in his own name.

Sure enough, the other Fivefold Holy Gates frantically competed for this treasure land, and they were finally purchased by the Nine Light Holy Gate.

"Yes, the Nine Lights Holy Gate purchased the Black Valley, if they send the original ancestor to garrison, I am afraid that they will encounter retaliation from the original god palace, but what does that have to do with me?"

Ye Tian smiled.

Anyway, he made a lot of money this time, so that's fine!

He sorted out the resources he had obtained from the Black Valley, and hundreds of them had an effect on him, although not too many, but not a lot.

Slowly accumulate resources, and the resources are enough!

"One Black Valley is not enough, we have to continue to snatch the resources of the Original God Palace, while cultivating, we also grab resources, so the speed is also very fast!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Time flies, Ye Tian quickly ran out of resources again, and the resources given to him by the Void Tooth Holy Gate were also exhausted, and he was still some distance away from the middle stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian was interested in another resource treasure of the Yuan Shen Palace, and was ready to plunder it again.

The treasure land to be attacked this time is the Wind and Thunder Realm of the Genshin Palace, where a lot of resources that are helpful to the Fivefold Origin Ancestor were also born, and his copy body also stays here.

However, after Ye Tian made a move this time, he was ready to change to a replica body of the Primordial Black Beast, otherwise if he continued to stay in the Primordial God Palace as the original ancestor of Jiuchen, he would definitely be investigated.

After all, if something happened twice, the body of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor was there, and the Original God Palace would definitely suspect it, and if you change your identity, there will be no problem!

So, Ye Tian set his eyes on another half-step fivefold ancestor who had just joined the Origin God Palace, and when the other party went out, he tracked it, and then instantly erased him, replacing his identity.

In this way, Ye Tian changed to a replica body.

As for the identity of the Nine Dust Ancestor, it will all be destroyed when it invades the Wind and Thunder Realm, so there will be no problem.

......

Wind and Thunder Realm.

Ye Tian came here, and immediately made another move, and soon completely wiped out all the primordial black beasts here, took away the resources here, and fled directly.

This time, the half-step sixfold ancestor of the Origin God Palace personally took action, and he didn't track down Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained another batch of resources.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to use this method to frantically collect the resources of the Origin Divine Palace, and finally raised his cultivation to the mid-stage realm of the Fifth Origin Ancestor.

As soon as the cultivation made a breakthrough, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

He felt that his strength was not weaker than those half-step sixfold ancestors, and he could even defeat them, but if he wanted to be invincible among the half-step sixfold ancestors, he would definitely not be able to do it.

Therefore, he was ready to wait for his cultivation to reach the late stage of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor realm, and then make a move on the Origin God Palace, directly destroying the entire Origin God Palace.

And at this time.

The five ancestors of the original god palace were very annoyed, and during this period of time, they had lost a lot of treasures.

According to their investigation, it was finally confirmed who the killer was.

The Endless Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate!

Genshin Jingu.

Taihan Saint Ancestor was extremely annoyed, he was the leader of the Origin Divine Palace, the only half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor powerhouse, who was in charge of the countless Origin Domain Eras, and nothing like this had happened.

One treasure after another has been lost, and they still haven't figured out why they were discovered.

It stands to reason that these treasures are very hidden and difficult to find, and even if one is found by luck, it will not be discovered so much in a short period of time.

The Taihan Holy Ancestor suspected that among these Fivefold Primordial Ancestors present, there were Primordial Black Beasts who colluded with the Endless Primordial Ancestors and leaked information.

But if you think about it carefully, it's not right, any primordial black beast joining the Genshin Palace has to make an extreme oath, even if there is a way to circumvent the oath and not die, it will be hit hard, and it will reveal the vision of being hit hard by the oath.

However, he had yet to find out of any of the Fivefold Ancestors who had such a situation.

"Strange, how did the Endless Origin Ancestor find so many treasures in my Origin God Palace?"

The Taihan Holy Ancestor was curious.

He didn't know if the Endless Ancestor would continue to attack the Genshin Palace, but he couldn't continue like this.

So, he issued an order: "From today onwards, all the resources in those treasure lands will be gathered in the Yuan Shen Palace, so that even if the treasure land is invaded, the loss will not be too great, and the endless original ancestor cannot continue to have a chance to collect resources." "

"Yes!"

A group of five-fold primordial black beasts answered.

......

Another time passed.

"The top management of the original shrine has changed its strategy, this time it has broken through several treasure lands, and the resources have been transferred!"

Ye Tian frowned.

In this way, he will not be able to get more resources!

"You can only slowly improve your cultivation first!"

Ye Tian muttered.
